name: Classic French Crème Brûlée
description: A rich vanilla custard base topped with a contrasting layer of hard caramel.

video.name: Perfect Crème Brûlée: A Step-by-Step Guide to the Classic French Dessert
video.description:
To make the perfect French Crème Brûlée, you’ll need these simple ingredients:
 • 2 cups of heavy cream
 • 3/4 cup of sugar
 • 5 large egg yolks
 • 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract

With these ingredients, you can create a rich, creamy dessert topped with a perfectly caramelized sugar crust.


For best results, cook gently and avoid overcooking to achieve the perfect creamy texture!


#cremebrulee#frenchdessert#homemadedessert#easydessertrecipe#bakinglove
